creator: robertfmage@hotmail.com
text:
I install freebsd go to boot and then the 6gig harddrive is 558megs or
something, 586megs I think.

Fix: 

Use 4.11 FreeBSD?
How-To-Repeat:  Install Freebsd standard way 1,2,3
Get done, then reboot!!!
There it is 568megs or something.
I thought it might be LBA or something?
